race.comment: ENCHANTED MISS (8) has spent a long time off the scene after tackling a much stronger race before the break. She was sighted in May last year before reappearing in April. Her two trials have been very impressive and Pike has been on board for both outings. Can return with a bang. PEIGI (10) finished off well behind a good winner here last time out. Winkers go on for the first time now and this looks to shape similarly from a good draw. She can continue to build on the first two efforts and with further improvement up her sleeve, she can make an impression. BELLE BELLE (5) has placed in both attempts over this course and distance and finished off strongly over 1240m to miss by a length on the line. Her recent level stacks up nicely in this field and if she can run to that level again, she can feature in the finish. NO COMEBACKS (3) can improve on the fresh performance. RAVIN' AVA (12) can feature coming back in trip.
